method.disclaimer: 描述器非擇時。相對輪動排名，衡量各資產／板塊相對其基準的強度與動能方向，非買賣訊號、非市場絕對報酬預測。
method.frames: 120: W=120,Wm=30,trail=15 · 60: W=60,Wm=15,trail=12 · 20: W=20,Wm=8,trail=10 (daily trading days, oldest->newest, last point = current)
method.rs_mom: 100+(rs_ratio-SMA(rs_ratio,Wm))/STD(rs_ratio,Wm); both smoothed with SMA(3d) before trail extraction
method.rs_ratio: JdK-style: 100+(RS-SMA(RS,W))/STD(RS,W); RS=100*price/benchmark_price aligned on benchmark grid (ffill)
